go-task-runner.summary: Go Task Runner is a lightweight web API and CLI tool designed to execute JSON-defined tasks with interval scheduling, tailored for small homelab environments.
facts: It enables users to automate repetitive tasks with simple configuration and supports dry-run mode for safe testing without execution.

infra-terraform.summary: Infra Terraform provides a reusable Terraform configuration for deploying a small application stack consisting of a VPC, subnets, and an app module with an S3 logging bucket, designed for study and demo environments.
facts: This project enables developers and DevOps engineers to quickly set up and manage a consistent, reproducible infrastructure stack for testing and demonstration purposes, reducing configuration drift and setup time.
Automated provisioning of a small app stack including VPC, subnets, and S3 logging

algorithms-toolkit.summary: Algorithms Toolkit is a Python command-line utility providing pre-built implementations of classic algorithms such as BFS, DFS, binary search, and Dijkstra's shortest path, along with a helper for reversing lists, designed to aid in algorithm practice and
facts: It enables developers and interview candidates to quickly test and verify algorithm correctness using realistic datasets and CLI interfaces, saving time and improving learning efficiency.
Execute BFS and DFS on graph data loaded from text files with node and neighbor definitions.
